source_intake_record.raw_question_text: As shown in the figure, $\angle AOE = 100^\circ$, $\angle BOF = 80^\circ$, OE bisects $\angle BOC$, and OF bisects $\angle AOC$. What is the measure of $\angle EOF$?
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text:
\textbf{Solution:} 

Since $OE$ bisects $\angle BOC$, and $OF$ bisects $\angle AOC$\\
Therefore, $\angle AOB=2\angle EOF$\\
Also, since $\angle AOB=\angle BOF+\angle AOE-\angle EOF=80^\circ+100^\circ-\angle EOF=180^\circ-\angle EOF$\\
Therefore, $2\angle EOF=180^\circ-\angle EOF$\\
Solving this gives $\angle EOF=\boxed{60^\circ}$
